Call and maybe having a couple expert interviews with your team.

How

Right?

Sorry, one second.
There we go.
They're in the healthcare space.
We start with a keyword.

We're looking at keywords, insert ranking factors, competitor content.

second, research Thank

And this would be, you know, what you'd be able to do in the platform pretty soon.
Okay.
Very cool.
But I think, you know, right now, we have a pretty, I would say, like, big backlog.
So we're about six weeks out with our strategy sprint kickoffs.
We do two a week.

And I think, you know, right now, unless editorial is, like, the big area where you want to invest, could make sense to maybe, you know, come back to us either when we've built out more work streams or when you guys have, like, created more pages on the blog, because it would be, like, a longer time horizon.
With not too many pages stood up right now, and not a ton of traffic hitting the website at the moment.
I mean, we have the pages.
I mean, we have the blog, so it's fine.
We need to start creating content for it, and it's something that...
Yeah, I've been testing a couple of tools for creating content.
That's one of the reasons that we're having this conversation.
But also, just like manual workflows and stuff like that, you know, if we really want to scale it, that doesn't scale.
But, you know, for the time being, I think getting some content on the blog, to your point, is what we need to do.
Yeah.
Makes sense.
I think the important thing to know, in terms of partnering with us, is just that the strategy sprint is $30,000 for...
Thank
You know, companies that are your size, the growth execution, it's 15K per month, and it's a 12-month term commitment.
When you're signing up with us, you are signing up for both, but you can opt out of phase two until the last week of phase one.

So I guess, you know, just with like the backlog we have right now, definitely let me know if this is like the priority for you guys, or if there's like other areas that you need a partner to also execute on.

And if editorial is, you know, the priority in the name of the game, then I'll do everything I can to, you know, get you guys in the queue and answer any questions that you have that would kind of, you know, make or break your decision on the partnership.
All right.
At 15K a month, you're basically getting like, what are you getting for that?
You're getting like 20 blog posts, right?
That's right.
Yeah.
So you're paying like almost $1,000 per blog post.
Yeah, I mean, in addition to like everything being staged and published and all of the LLM visibility and analytics, you wouldn't need like a tool like Profound, for example.
But like I said, right?
Talk more about the LLM visibility and analytics.

Just tracking any prompts that you want to track, being able to track topics outside of those prompts, being able to see where you're showing up across all the different LLMs, whether it's ChatGPT or, you know, Perplexity or Cloud.
Can show us your platform?
Would you mind demoing that a little bit in more detail?
Um, yeah, right, right now it's just like custom reporting through scrunch.
So for augment code, I think I've got access to theirs.
So Augment Code, it would allow you to track all of these different prompts.

Within the prompts, there's all these different topics.

And then I'm not too familiar with some of the other parts of this platform at the moment.
Got it.
But, yeah, any other questions?
more about how you're planning on evolving over time?
Yeah, definitely.
guys in, like, three months, are you going to be doing more?
Yeah, I think.
We're offering, or, like, yeah, what's the direction that you're going in?

Are you going, like, more towards product from, like, full service agency, or are you going, yeah, more towards, where you'll have, like, more other options that are a little less full service and more tech enabled, or are you going, or are you trying to build out different lines of business, or just, like, focus exclusively on this for now, and you expect the offering not to change?
Yeah, definitely.
So we're planning to build an option that is more self-serve.
We've been building that.
A lot of it is around, like, the LLM visibility and analytics, less about, like, the content creation.
Um, but...
Yeah.

You know, one thing that you would see in the future is like a lower priced option that's more self-service, being in the platform, working with us in the platform, seeing like what's happening as we execute, and then probably standing up work streams that we can deliver more repeatedly for clients, like programmatic is like a consistent work stream that we would offer.
But yeah, right now it is just the editorial.

But, you know, I think, I think what Marcel would say is like, at this stage, it probably makes sense to do some more experimentation first, like trying out some different tools, seeing how high the quality is when you use those tools to build workflows, investing in maybe other channels.
Like, out.
Like, out.
Outbound and paid to start getting some initial traction.
And when you feel better about, you know, the direction that you want to scale with your blog and how important editorial is, we could absolutely be a great partner.
It just seems like there's like much more that you would want from a partner at this stage.
And it's just something that we're not, you know, planning to do right now.
Yeah, and I think we're also, at this stage, not able to commit to budgets in that range.
I mean, just candidly.
But after some experimentation, we might know kind of what works and it might make sense because, you know, the high-touch model really makes it very hands-off for us, which I like.
It's just a matter of, you know, are we confident that this is the right strategy?
For sure.
For sure.
But definitely want to stay in touch and keep you guys up to date with the big developments in the platform and the offerings.
And I appreciate y'all reaching out.
Definitely good to make the connection.
Yeah, appreciate it.
Thanks, Tyler.
Thank you.
Thanks, guys.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between WorkMate and GrowthX for AI-powered content creation and growth automation.](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers high-touch, AI-driven content creation services with expert oversight ($30K strategy sprint, $15K/mo for 12 months)](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [WorkMate seeks growth automation tools but isn't ready for GrowthX's full-service offering due to budget constraints and need for experimentation](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [GrowthX is evolving towards a self-serve platform with LLM visibility/analytics and may offer lower-priced options in the future](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Current Offering

  - [End-to-end partner for SEO/GEO strategy, content creation, and LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Focus on editorial work stream (e.g., blog creation) with 5 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Two-phase engagement: strategy sprint ($30K) and growth execution ($15K/mo, 12-month commitment)](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Sophisticated AI workflows combined with human expertise (e.g., managing director, editor, content manager)](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Fact-checking and personalization capabilities to ensure accuracy and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)

### GrowthX's Differentiation

  - [White-glove service vs. self-serve tools like AirOps or Jasper](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [Expert team with backgrounds from Fanatics, TripAdvisor, TechCrunch, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Proprietary platform for content creation workflow and analytics](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [Custom LLM visibility reporting through Scrunch for tracking prompts and citations across various AI models](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)

### WorkMate's Needs and Constraints

  - [Seeking tools to automate and amplify growth efforts as a small, scrappy team](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Currently experimenting with content creation tools and manual workflows](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Not ready to commit to GrowthX's full-service offering due to budget constraints](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Need to build confidence in content strategy before significant investment](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)

### GrowthX's Future Plans

  - [Developing a more self-serve option focused on LLM visibility and analytics](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
  - [Potential lower-priced tier with increased platform access for clients](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
  - [Expanding to offer additional work streams (e.g., programmatic advertising)](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [No immediate plans to diverge from current editorial focus](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)

## Next Steps

  - [WorkMate to continue experimenting with content creation tools and strategies](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [GrowthX to keep WorkMate updated on platform developments and new offerings](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Potential for future partnership once WorkMate has more confidence in content strategy and budget allocation](https://fathom.video/share/2oEagyadXcyyivbdTemTjKsVvq496N4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
